SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR QUESTIONS DEFENDANT/JUDGMENBT DEBTOR THROUGH THE COURT AS TO INFORMATION PROVIDED ON THE SC-133. JUDGMENT CREDITOR STATES UNDER OATH THAT HE DOES NOT HAVE ANY ASSETS AND DOES NOT MAINTAIN ANY BANK ACCOUNTS OR ANY OTHER FINANCIAL ACCOUNTS UNDER HIS NAME, AND THAT HE DOES NOT PAY RENT OR MORTGAGE. COURT INSTRUCTS THE JUDGEMENT CREDITOR THAT HE MAY CALL THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IN ON ANOTHER OEX HEARING IN 90 DAYS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR - PER COURT ORDER DISCHARGING ORDER OF EXAMINATION (AS TO PAUL FRESINA - THIRD PARTY.)
